query:
-- 先获取刚插入的房间ID
SELECT id, title FROM rollRooms ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2d1S7viP934C9u9.root --database f39rghmcCDkVuc3rBX8cym --execute -- 先获取刚插入的房间ID
SELECT id, title FROM rollRooms ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
